title: Packet 087 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
objective: Publish the Packet 087 host-native operator publication workflow tranche through the parent-root boundary and restore `/home/olares/code/apex` to clean parity so the new operator workflow is durable on the authoritative host mirror.
dependency_note: Packet 087 moved the default operator git-preparation guidance to the Olares-hosted mirror and added host helper tasks locally. This gate records publication to the GitHub-canonical parent-root boundary and restoration of the authoritative host mirror to clean parity.
next_packet_candidate: Execute Packet 088 as bounded publication and host-mirror resync only.
sql_permission_note: This publication gate authorizes no database writes, no source/test runtime mutation, no package or lockfile mutation, no installs, no runtime or service mutation, no AI-services expansion, no remote rewrite, no rollback or force/reset/clean, and no old-clone mutation.
